summary: IP Global Terminal app — removing admin token gate so the app is publicly accessible via a clean shareable URL without requiring a caffeineAdminToken fragment.
architectural_notes: App previously required a #caffeineAdminToken URL fragment for access; this gate is being removed for public sharing.

existing_features.title: Remove the admin token gate from the frontend so the app is fully publicly accessible without requiring a `caffeineAdminToken` URL fragment. The app should load normally for any visitor at the clean URL (e.g., `https://ip-global-terminal-2sw.caffeine.xyz/`) without checking for or redirecting based on any token.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove admin token gate so the app is publicly accessible via a clean shareable URL
